description: nbg.gr is the National Bank of Greece website and developer portal for banking, payments, and corporate digital services. Its developer offerings include PSD2/open-banking APIs and other business APIs published through the NBG Developers Portal.
summary: NBG exposes a developer portal with multiple OAuth2-protected HTTP APIs, including UK Open Banking account-information/payment/cof APIs, Berlin Group account-information, bill payments, file management, and a file-management CLI.

surfaces.name: Account Information API - UK Open Banking
Payment Initiation API - UK Open Banking
Confirmation of Funds API - UK Open Banking
